title: IEEE Nordic test system model
description: Power-system model and operational data for the IEEE Nordic test system, produced as a summer project. Useful as a reference network for power-flow, dynamics and educational studies in the Nordic context.
notes: Licence not clearly stated in the repository -- marked LicenseRef-NONE, meaning reuse rights are not granted by default. Confirm with the authors before reusing. Listed as an affiliated KTH-EPE resource.
